gil-cisneros.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Near-canonical coastal-D progressive profile — Heritage Action 0% lifetime, 100% PP/NARAL, Giffords/HRC endorsed, anti-wall, anti-SAVE-Act, anti-voucher. ONE genuine cross-rubric catch: FP Q0 Article I war powers HARD-TRUE — as New Dem NatSec WG Chair, publicly demanded House reconvene for binding Iran war-powers vote after Trump strikes ('The Constitution explicitly gives Congress and only Congress the authority and heavy responsibility to send our nation to war'), co-sponsored Deluzio Iran War Funding Prohibition. Catch partially offset by AIPAC/AIEF cluster: FP Q3 HARD-FALSE — accepted $30K+ from pro-Israel groups 2023-24, August 2025 AIPAC-funded AIEF Israel trip (drew CAIR-CA criticism). Biblical-marriage all-FALSE: HRC endorsed + Equality Act co-sponsor pledge + DoD trans-troop/Chief DEI Officer record. SOL: PP endorsed, anti-Hyde, OnTheIssues 'trust women' frame. As DoD Under SecDef expanded service-member abortion travel — operational SOL FALSE. CL Q0 NULL (Catholic on Pew but no public Christian witness in office). NDC NatSec Working Group leadership = unusual structural position for a freshman; the Article I catch is real and consistent. PENDING: pull literal Cisneros roll calls on Laken Riley (HR29 1/7/2025) and SAVE Act (HR22 4/10/2025) — almost certainly NO based on posture but cited HARD by roll call is stronger than SOFT inference; left those cells NULL on strict bar.

brad-sherman.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. 30-year coastal-D maximalist with HARD-FALSE clusters in life, marriage, family, immigration, self-defense, and election integrity. ONE TRUE catch: FP Q0 Article I — voted YES on H.Con.Res.83 (1/9/2020) terminating Iran hostilities absent Congressional authorization; on-record that Congress declares war. HEADLINE CATCH (cross-party deviation in the OTHER direction — sharpens not softens FP cluster): Sherman is a HAWK to the right of progressive Dems on Iran/Israel — authored CISADA Iran sanctions provisions (uranium-procurement + all-Iranian-banks); drove the 2024 $14.1B Israel emergency supplemental; refuses ceasefire without Hamas disarmament; voted YES on 2002 Iraq AUMF; $692,943 career pro-Israel total per Bought By Zionism + $23,844 Pro-Israel America PAC + $9,530 NORPAC; Israel Allied Caucus co-chair. Common Dreams labeled his Iran posture 'reckless and repugnant' (2020). LEAD reintroducer of Women's Health Protection Act 2023 + lead reintroducer Equality Act 2025 — sponsor-tier FALSEs on SOL + Marriage + CL. Voted NO on Laken Riley (1/22/2025) + NO on SAVE Act (HR7296 2/11/2026) + NO on HR5 Parents Bill of Rights (3/24/2023) + YES on RFMA + YES on BSCA + YES on AWB + cosponsor HR1. NRA-PVF F + 100% Brady + voted NO on Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act 2005 → 2A all-FALSE. Jewish (Valley Beth Shalom) — CL Q0 NULL per rubric (no Christian profession to evaluate). Heritage Action 119th = 0% session, 6% lifetime.

pete-aguilar.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. TEXTBOOK House-Dem-leadership FALSE-cluster — Caucus Chair = structural leadership position whose votes ARE the Dem caucus position. ONE TRUE catch: FP Q0 Article I — named leadership driver of June 2026 Iran War Powers Resolution (passed 215-208 6/3/2026); per Jeffries office 'Democratic Leadership Ranking Members Announce Iran War Powers Resolution Vote.' VOTE TRAIL: YES on WHPA 7/15/2022 (cosponsor); YES on RFMA Roll 373 12/8/2022 (cosponsor); YES on Equality Act Roll 39 2/25/2021 (cosponsor); NO on HR5 Parents Bill of Rights Roll 161 3/24/2023 ('highly partisan'); NO on Laken Riley Roll 23 1/22/2025 (LED Dem press defense — 'ICE and CBP terrorize communities, beat down doors, rip people out of cars'); YES on BSCA 6/24/2022 + YES on AWB 2022 (cosponsor AWB 2015/2023 HR698); YES on HR1 For the People 3/3/2021 + publicly attacked SAVE Act as 'federal takeover of state and local elections.' COSPONSOR EACH Woman Act (Hyde repeal). LEADERSHIP-TIER AIPAC: $673,468 in 2023-24 cycle (top California Dem); cumulative ~$867K-$1.1M lifetime; AIPAC-funded Israel trip. Backed $3.8B Israel weapons package + voted YES on Israel Security Supplemental HR6126. Catholic per Pew but no public Christian witness — CL Q0 NULL. Heritage Action 116th 0% / 115th 6% / lifetime ~5%. No RESOLUTE-aligned cross-party deviations of substance (one Merger Filing Fee Modernization NO was antitrust not rubric).

jimmy-gomez.notes_set: Federal evidence finalization 2026-06-05. Near-uniform progressive D — Heritage Action 0%, founding Medicare-for-All caucus member, Equality Act cosponsor, Giffords/NARAL/PP-endorsed. ONE TRUE catch: FP Q0 Article I — floor remarks in support of Iran War Powers Resolution invoking Congressional war-authorization authority. NOTABLE PARADOX (sharpens FP Q1-Q3 FALSEs not credits): Despite Progressive Caucus Deputy Whip status, one of AIPAC's largest House D beneficiaries — $2.69M lifetime per Track AIPAC; ~$46K direct PAC 2026 cycle; $2.5M in AIPAC/super-PAC spending 2024; The Intercept + LA Taco frame as Israel-establishment outlier inside the progressive bloc; absent from Ramirez Block-the-Bombs Act (73 D cosponsors). RELIGION CORRECTION: brief assumed Catholic — actually NO Christian affiliation; Freethought Caucus member + Secular Coalition profile — CL Q0 HARD-FALSE (self-IDed with secular caucus). VOTES: YES RFMA Roll 513 12/8/2022; Equality Act original cosponsor; denounced anti-trans-youth legislation; Giffords-endorsed signed AWB/UBC/mag-ban discharge petitions; founded GVP Working Group in Dads Caucus; YES BSCA June 2022; publicly opposed SAVE Act via Facebook; floor remarks Iran WPR. NOTABLE LEFT-FLANK DEFECTION: NO on Fiscal Responsibility Act of 2023 (one of 46 D against — defected from LEFT for insufficient spending; ECON Q2 HARD-FALSE anti-BBA posture). CURRENCY ALERT: today 6/2/2026 CNN + ABC7 reported House Ethics Committee investigation over sexual-misconduct allegations — materially affects 'sitting in good standing' framing; flagged in office field and profile background for transparency.
